title: AI Breakthrough Awards
summary: [![Image 1: AI Breakthrough Awards](https://aibreakthroughawards.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/AI_Breakthrough_Awards_Logo-outlined-1.png)](https://aibreakthroughawards.com/). ![Image 2: AI_Breakthrough_Awards_Logo](https://aibreakthroughawards.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/AI_Breakthrough_Awards_Logo.png). Now in its 9th year, the annual AI Breakthrough Awards reflect nearly a decade at the forefront of the Artificial Intelligence industry – tracking its evolution from early experimentation to real-world, enterprise-scale impact. ![Image 3](https://aibreakthroughawards.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/ai-004.png). ![Image 20](https://aibreakthroughawards.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/ai-008.png). An AI Breakthrough Award positions your organization among the innovators defining the future of intelligent technology. ![Image 21](https://aibreakthroughawards.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/ai-004.png). ![Image 22](https://aibreakthroughawards.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/AI-Illustrations_05.png). The AI Breakthrough Awards program offers an unparalleled opportunity to showcase your innovation, gain global recognition and solidify your position as a leader in the AI industry. Winning an AI Breakthrough Award highlights your company as a trailblazer in AI technology innovation. With thousands of nominations coming in each year across a wide range of categories, winning an AI Breakthrough Award places your organization among the top innovators in the global artificial intelligence technology space. As an AI Breakthrough winner, you become part of a global community of artificial intelligence technology innovators.
